tool.name: OGS: PartitionMesh
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'PartitionMesh'.
tool.command: ln -s '$mesh_input_file' '$mesh_input_file.element_identifier'; ln -s '$metis_mesh_input_file' '$metis_mesh_input_file.element_identifier'; ## Symlinks für Repeat other_meshes_filenames #for $item in $other_meshes_filenames_repeat ln -s '$item.element' '$item.element.element_identifier'; #end for PartitionMesh --mesh-input-file '$mesh_input_file.element_identifier' --metis-mesh-input-file '$metis_mesh_input_file.element_identifier' $np: --np '$np' $ogs2metis $exe_metis -- #for $item in $other_meshes_filenames_repeat '$item.element.element_identifier' #end for --output output_1.vtu

param.name: mesh_input_file
param.label: mesh input file
param.help: Input (.vtu). The name of the file containing the input mesh

param.name: metis_mesh_input_file
param.label: metis mesh input file
param.help: Input (.mesh). Base name (without .mesh extension) of the file containing the metis input mesh

param.name: ogs2metis
param.label: ogs2metis
param.help: Indicator to convert the ogs mesh file to METIS input file

param.name: exe_metis
param.label: exe metis
param.help: Call mpmetis inside the programme via system().

tool.help: This tool runs the **PartitionMesh** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
